title: My Way
lyrics: Up, up, up, up, up, up, up, up, up, up, up Up, up, up, up, up, up, up, up, up, up, up, up When you see me rocking that ride-way Rocking in my way, don't look too high Don't look too high, just my melody All remedies inside me When you see me rocking in my way Don't sit there and don't look too high Cause, it could've been you Girl, it could've been you Hey, I'm not talking about the sin Or what the, what the life is I'm talking about you as my, my friend And my wife says, why we doing this And why are we doing this Are you hurting ourselves And our son said, why are we doing this Cause when you see me rocking in my way Don't stare, don't stare I can't believe you're treating our love like this And now you don't remember all the joy All, all the joy we had And everything that felt so right And now you're like, fuck that I don't even wanna have a fight in anymore Why, why you running away with the lies Don't run and hide Come on, don't run and hide Run away Run away in the night When I, when I needed to most To like, just a toast But we took it away, it wasn't what we ought to be getting But we started over, we did the song Made the album, then we had to fall Had to fall, and now we're divided So baby, let me tell you When you see me rocking in my way Don't you stare too much, no Don't stare, cause I'm balling and I'm falling And I'm flying over the moon, yeah Don't stare when you see me rolling my way It could've been him, could've been us Could've been, just a Stereotype, stereotype Denied if I slay, racist stereotype I know you're broke, freaking dead I know the river of truth I know you, even though you don't think you do Even though you don't think you do
